## 👋 About me

Hi! I'm **David Conesa Pagán**, a Naval Architecture &amp; Marine Systems Engineering student at **UPCT**. I got here after completing the first year of the Physics degree, which left me with a solid base in maths and physics — and the habit of always asking *why*.

I love **research**, **writing technical reports**, and **programming**: turning problems into numbers, and numbers into something that floats. These days I'm building computational-physics and hydrodynamics tools in Python and going deeper into CFD and finite-element analysis.
